info.title: Converio - Recruiters API
info.description: Recruiter-facing endpoints for the operator + recruiter portal. Today: synchronous recruiter knowledge-base indexing. Source of truth for the recruiter API contract; backend Pydantic models and frontend TS clients are generated from this file.

tags.name: Recruiters
tags.description: Recruiter onboarding, indexing, and lifecycle operations.

post.summary: Run recruiter indexing workflow and return result
post.description: Loads the recruiter row + linked clients + linked placements from Postgres, builds a `RecruiterProfile`, and synchronously executes RecruiterIndexingWorkflow on the Temporal `converio-queue`. Returns 200 with the resolved indexing result so the wizard can redirect to the dashboard immediately. On the rare 30s timeout, returns 504 with the workflow_id so the client can fall back to a status poll.

200.description: Recruiter indexing completed. The data payload mirrors the workflow's RecruiterIndexingResult.

404.description: Recruiter not found for the supplied id.

500.description: Internal server error - workflow execution failed for a non-timeout reason.

504.description: Workflow exceeded the 30s execution timeout. Frontend should fall back to a status poll using `workflow_id` from the response detail.

correlation_id.description: Request correlation id propagated from middleware (X-Correlation-ID header).

IndexRecruiterData.description: Data payload for a completed recruiter indexing run. Projection of RecruiterIndexingResult.

workflow_id.description: Temporal workflow id (deterministic per recruiter; ALLOW_DUPLICATE reuse policy enables re-indexing).

status.description: Result status from RecruiterIndexingWorkflow. `pending` = enrichment partial; `active` = ready for matching; `failed` = retry / contact ops.

credibility_score.description: Credibility score in [0, 1] derived from past placements + linked clients.

source.description: Provenance of the indexing run - matches the workflow input contract.

IndexRecruiterTimeoutResponse.description: 504 response shape when the workflow exceeds the 30s execution timeout.

message.example: Indexing exceeded 30s timeout; check status via Temporal UI

ErrorResponse.description: FastAPI error response. `detail` is either a string (HTTPException) or a list of validation error objects.
